g.text: Key and value stored together in each slot
Keys and values in separate arrays
2 cache lines (1 for keys, 1 for value on hit)

div.p: For 5-slot probe with hit: Combined: Load 5 × 24 bytes = 120 bytes Separated: Load 5 × 8 bytes + 1 × 8 bytes = 48 bytes Savings: 2.5× less memory traffic For value types larger than uint64_t, the savings are even greater.
64 bytes = 2.6 entries Probe 5 slots = 2 cache lines
64 bytes = 8 keys Probe 5 slots = 1 cache line
